english translation text: MAATAM HAY AAJ ASKARI SHAHR ZISHAN KAToday we lament for the glorious Imam Hassan Askari (a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
MAATAM HAY AAJ ASKARI SHAHR ZISHAN KAURYAN SAR HAY AAJ IMAME ZAMAAN KA
Today we lament for the glorious Imam Hassan Askari,
On this day, Imam Zamana is grief stricken
@HujjatELC

JAB ZEHR KE SADME SE TADAPNE LAGE SARWARNAZEON MEI THA VO WAKEYA TASWIRE HASSAN KA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When the effects of the poison made, the Imam tremble with pain,
This brought back remembrance of the death of the second holy Imam Hasan

urdu transliteration text:
RONE SE HASHRA HOGAYA SAB JINNO BASHAR METABUT UTHA JAB KE SHAHE DO JAHAN KA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The mourning started amongst all the creation- jinn and human,
When the body of the master of the heavens and earth was lifted
